overview: An immersive, exploration-driven real estate discovery platform for Property Discoverer, focused on Vadodara's Sama-Savli Road area. Features a hero with AI-style search, smart filters, Pinterest-inspired property grid, property detail modals, favorites, personalized recommendations, and soft-sell CTAs wired to WhatsApp and direct call.
features: Animated hero with AI-style search bar
Property detail popup/modal with full info and image gallery
Trust section with local expertise messaging
WhatsApp & Expert Call CTAs (wired to real numbers)
